raw_sql:
SELECT lt.id, lt.link, COUNT(*) as link_count
FROM movie_link ml
JOIN link_type lt ON ml.link_type_id = lt.id
GROUP BY lt.id, lt.link
ORDER BY link_count DESC;

WITH sequel_edges AS (
  SELECT 
    LEAST(ml.movie_id, ml.linked_movie_id) AS a,
    GREATEST(ml.movie_id, ml.linked_movie_id) AS b
  FROM movie_link ml
  WHERE ml.link_type_id IN (1, 2)
),
-- Get all movies involved in sequel chains since 1980
franchise_movies AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT unnest(ARRAY[a, b]) AS movie_id
  FROM sequel_edges
),
-- Join to title to get year info
titled AS (
  SELECT fm.movie_id, t.title, t.production_year
  FROM franchise_movies fm
  JOIN title t ON t.id = fm.movie_id
  WHERE t.production_year >= 1980
    AND t.kind_id = 1  -- movies only
),
-- Find franchise roots: movies that are "followed by" something (first in chain)
roots AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ml.movie_id AS root_id
  FROM movie_link ml
  WHERE ml.link_type_id = 2  -- followed by
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM movie_link ml2
    WHERE ml2.link_type_id = 1  -- follows
      AND ml2.movie_id = ml.movie_id
  )
),
-- Count how many sequels each root has (direct + transitive, approximate via all connected)
root_chains AS (
  SELECT 
    r.root_id,
    t.title AS franchise_name,
    t.production_year,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ml.linked_movie_id) AS direct_sequels
  FROM roots r
  JOIN title t ON t.id = r.root_id
  JOIN movie_link ml ON ml.movie_id = r.root_id AND ml.link_type_id = 2
  WHERE t.production_year >= 1980 AND t.kind_id = 1
  GROUP BY r.root_id, t.title, t.production_year
)
SELECT franchise_name, production_year, direct_sequels, root_id
FROM root_chains
ORDER BY direct_sequels DESC
LIMIT 20;

WITH sequel_pairs AS (
  SELECT movie_id, linked_movie_id
  FROM movie_link
  WHERE link_type_id IN (1, 2)
),
all_franchise_movies AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT movie_id AS mid FROM sequel_pairs
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT linked_movie_id FROM sequel_pairs
),
-- For each movie, find its earliest "companion" as a proxy for franchise grouping
-- Use the minimum movie_id in the connected pair as a franchise key (approximate)
franchise_groups AS (
  SELECT 
    LEAST(sp.movie_id, sp.linked_movie_id) AS franchise_key,
    sp.movie_id,
    sp.linked_movie_id
  FROM sequel_pairs sp
),
franchise_size AS (
  SELECT 
    franchise_key,
    COUNT(DISTINCT mid) AS film_count
  FROM franchise_groups fg
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL (VALUES (fg.movie_id), (fg.linked_movie_id)) AS v(mid)
  GROUP BY franchise_key
)
SELECT 
  fs.franchise_key,
  t.title AS anchor_title,
  t.production_year,
  fs.film_count
FROM franchise_size fs
JOIN title t ON t.id = fs.franchise_key
WHERE t.production_year >= 1980 AND t.kind_id = 1
ORDER BY fs.film_count DESC
LIMIT 20;

WITH sequel_pairs AS (
  SELECT movie_id AS a, linked_movie_id AS b
  FROM movie_link
  WHERE link_type_id IN (1, 2)
),
all_nodes AS (
  SELECT a AS mid FROM sequel_pairs
  UNION
  SELECT b FROM sequel_pairs
),
-- Count degree of each node (how many sequel connections)
node_degree AS (
  SELECT mid, COUNT(*) AS connections
  FROM (
    SELECT a AS mid FROM sequel_pairs
    UNION ALL
    SELECT b FROM sequel_pairs
  ) x
  GROUP BY mid
),
top_nodes AS (
  SELECT nd.mid, nd.connections, t.title, t.production_year, t.kind_id
  FROM node_degree nd
  JOIN title t ON t.id = nd.mid
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1
  ORDER BY nd.connections DESC
  LIMIT 30
)
SELECT mid, title, production_year, connections
FROM top_nodes
ORDER BY connections DESC;

WITH RECURSIVE franchise_chain AS (
  -- Seed: movies that have sequels but are not themselves sequels (franchise starters)
  SELECT 
    ml.movie_id AS root_id,
    ml.linked_movie_id AS member_id,
    1 AS depth
  FROM movie_link ml
  WHERE ml.link_type_id = 2  -- "followed by"
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM movie_link ml2 
      WHERE ml2.link_type_id = 1 AND ml2.linked_movie_id = ml.movie_id
    )
  UNION ALL
  -- Recurse: find what each member is followed by
  SELECT 
    fc.root_id,
    ml.linked_movie_id,
    fc.depth + 1
  FROM franchise_chain fc
  JOIN movie_link ml ON ml.movie_id = fc.member_id AND ml.link_type_id = 2
  WHERE fc.depth < 20
),
-- Include the root itself
all_members AS (
  SELECT root_id, root_id AS member_id FROM franchise_chain
  UNION
  SELECT root_id, member_id FROM franchise_chain
),
-- Count members per franchise, filter where any member is post-1980
franchise_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    am.root_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT am.member_id) AS total_films
  FROM all_members am
  JOIN title t ON t.id = am.member_id
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1
  GROUP BY am.root_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT am.member_id) >= 3
)
SELECT 
  fc.total_films,
  fc.root_id,
  t.title AS root_title,
  t.production_year AS root_year
FROM franchise_counts fc
JOIN title t ON t.id = fc.root_id
ORDER BY fc.total_films DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT ml.movie_id, t1.title AS movie_title, t1.production_year,
       ml.link_type_id, lt.link,
       ml.linked_movie_id, t2.title AS linked_title, t2.production_year AS linked_year
FROM movie_link ml
JOIN link_type lt ON lt.id = ml.link_type_id
JOIN title t1 ON t1.id = ml.movie_id
JOIN title t2 ON t2.id = ml.linked_movie_id
WHERE ml.link_type_id IN (1, 2)
  AND t1.kind_id = 1 AND t2.kind_id = 1
  AND t1.production_year >= 1980
ORDER BY t1.title
LIMIT 30;

SELECT ml.link_type_id, lt.link, t1.kind_id AS movie_kind, t2.kind_id AS linked_kind, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM movie_link ml
JOIN link_type lt ON lt.id = ml.link_type_id
JOIN title t1 ON t1.id = ml.movie_id
JOIN title t2 ON t2.id = ml.linked_movie_id
WHERE ml.link_type_id IN (1, 2)
GROUP BY ml.link_type_id, lt.link, t1.kind_id, t2.kind_id
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT kt.id, kt.kind, COUNT(t.id) AS title_count
FROM kind_type kt
LEFT JOIN title t ON t.kind_id = kt.id
GROUP BY kt.id, kt.kind
ORDER BY kt.id;

WITH sequel_links AS (
  SELECT ml.movie_id, ml.linked_movie_id
  FROM movie_link ml
  WHERE ml.link_type_id IN (1, 2)
),
all_nodes AS (
  SELECT movie_id AS mid FROM sequel_links
  UNION
  SELECT linked_movie_id FROM sequel_links
),
-- Tag each node with title info
node_info AS (
  SELECT an.mid, t.title, t.production_year, t.kind_id
  FROM all_nodes an
  JOIN title t ON t.id = an.mid
  WHERE t.kind_id IN (1, 3, 4)  -- movies, tv movies, video movies
    AND t.production_year >= 1980
),
-- For each movie, find how many sequel connections it has among movies
movie_edges AS (
  SELECT sl.movie_id AS a, sl.linked_movie_id AS b
  FROM sequel_links sl
  WHERE sl.movie_id IN (SELECT mid FROM node_info)
    AND sl.linked_movie_id IN (SELECT mid FROM node_info)
),
-- Use LEAST/GREATEST to create undirected edges, then find cluster size
edge_union AS (
  SELECT LEAST(a,b) AS lo, GREATEST(a,b) AS hi FROM movie_edges
),
-- Count distinct neighbors per node as proxy for cluster membership
node_neighbors AS (
  SELECT lo AS mid, hi AS neighbor FROM edge_union
  UNION ALL
  SELECT hi AS mid, lo AS neighbor FROM edge_union
),
cluster_proxy AS (
  SELECT mid, MIN(neighbor) AS cluster_key, COUNT(DISTINCT neighbor) AS neighbor_count
  FROM node_neighbors
  GROUP BY mid
)
SELECT 
  cp.cluster_key,
  t.title AS anchor_title,
  t.production_year,
  SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY cp.cluster_key) AS cluster_size,
  cp.neighbor_count
FROM cluster_proxy cp
JOIN title t ON t.id = cp.cluster_key
ORDER BY cluster_size DESC, cluster_key
LIMIT 30;

SELECT ml.movie_id, t1.title AS movie_title, t1.production_year, t1.kind_id,
       ml.link_type_id, lt.link,
       ml.linked_movie_id, t2.title AS linked_title, t2.production_year AS linked_year, t2.kind_id AS linked_kind
FROM movie_link ml
JOIN link_type lt ON lt.id = ml.link_type_id
JOIN title t1 ON t1.id = ml.movie_id
JOIN title t2 ON t2.id = ml.linked_movie_id
WHERE ml.link_type_id = 2  -- "followed by"
ORDER BY t1.production_year DESC
LIMIT 30;

WITH movie_sequel_links AS (
  SELECT ml.movie_id, ml.linked_movie_id
  FROM movie_link ml
  JOIN title t1 ON t1.id = ml.movie_id
  JOIN title t2 ON t2.id = ml.linked_movie_id
  WHERE ml.link_type_id IN (1, 2)
    AND t1.kind_id IN (1, 3, 4)
    AND t2.kind_id IN (1, 3, 4)
),
all_movie_nodes AS (
  SELECT movie_id AS mid FROM movie_sequel_links
  UNION
  SELECT linked_movie_id FROM movie_sequel_links
),
node_connections AS (
  SELECT mid, COUNT(*) AS conn_count
  FROM (
    SELECT movie_id AS mid FROM movie_sequel_links
    UNION ALL
    SELECT linked_movie_id FROM movie_sequel_links
  ) x
  GROUP BY mid
)
SELECT nc.mid, t.title, t.production_year, t.kind_id, nc.conn_count
FROM node_connections nc
JOIN title t ON t.id = nc.mid
ORDER BY nc.conn_count DESC
LIMIT 30;

SELECT t1.kind_id, t2.kind_id, COUNT(*) 
FROM movie_link ml
JOIN title t1 ON t1.id = ml.movie_id
JOIN title t2 ON t2.id = ml.linked_movie_id
WHERE ml.link_type_id IN (1,2)
  AND (t1.production_year >= 1980 OR t2.production_year >= 1980)
GROUP BY t1.kind_id, t2.kind_id
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

SELECT 
  LEAST(ml.movie_id, ml.linked_movie_id) AS cluster_key,
  array_agg(DISTINCT t1.title ORDER BY t1.title) AS titles_a,
  array_agg(DISTINCT t2.title ORDER BY t2.title) AS titles_b,
  COUNT(*) AS link_count
FROM movie_link ml
JOIN title t1 ON t1.id = ml.movie_id
JOIN title t2 ON t2.id = ml.linked_movie_id
WHERE ml.link_type_id IN (1, 2)
  AND t1.kind_id = 1 AND t2.kind_id = 1
GROUP BY LEAST(ml.movie_id, ml.linked_movie_id)
ORDER BY link_count DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT ml.movie_id, ml.linked_movie_id, t1.kind_id, t2.kind_id, t1.title, t2.title
FROM movie_link ml
JOIN title t1 ON t1.id = ml.movie_id
JOIN title t2 ON t2.id = ml.linked_movie_id
WHERE ml.link_type_id IN (1, 2)
  AND t1.kind_id = 1
LIMIT 20;

SELECT ml.movie_id, ml.linked_movie_id, t1.kind_id, t2.kind_id, t1.title, t2.title, t1.production_year, t2.production_year
FROM movie_link ml
JOIN title t1 ON t1.id = ml.movie_id
JOIN title t2 ON t2.id = ml.linked_movie_id
WHERE ml.link_type_id IN (1, 2)
  AND t2.kind_id = 1
LIMIT 30;

WITH movie_links_1 AS (
  SELECT ml.movie_id AS a, ml.linked_movie_id AS b
  FROM movie_link ml
  JOIN title t1 ON t1.id = ml.movie_id
  JOIN title t2 ON t2.id = ml.linked_movie_id
  WHERE ml.link_type_id IN (1, 2)
    AND t1.production_year >= 1980
    AND t2.production_year >= 1980
    AND t2.kind_id = 1
),
all_ids AS (
  SELECT a AS mid FROM movie_links_1
  UNION
  SELECT b AS mid FROM movie_links_1
),
-- count how many times each id appears as b (= is a sequel film)
sequel_films AS (
  SELECT b AS mid, COUNT(*) AS pred_count FROM movie_links_1 GROUP BY b
),
-- get title info for all nodes
node_info AS (
  SELECT ai.mid, t.title, t.production_year, t.kind_id
  FROM all_ids ai
  JOIN title t ON t.id = ai.mid
)
SELECT ni.mid, ni.title, ni.production_year, ni.kind_id, COALESCE(sf.pred_count, 0) AS is_sequel_of_count
FROM node_info ni
LEFT JOIN sequel_films sf ON sf.mid = ni.mid
ORDER BY ni.production_year
LIMIT 40;

WITH franchise_candidates AS (
  SELECT 
    t.id, t.title, t.production_year,
    -- Extract potential franchise name (first significant word group)
    regexp_replace(t.title, '\s+(2|II|III|IV|V|VI|VII|VIII|IX|X|Part\s+\d+|Chapter\s+\d+|\d+).*$', '', 'i') AS base_title
  FROM title t
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1
    AND t.production_year >= 1980
    AND t.production_year <= 2015
),
franchise_groups AS (
  SELECT base_title, COUNT(*) AS film_count, 
         array_agg(title ORDER BY production_year) AS films,
         MIN(production_year) AS first_year,
         MAX(production_year) AS last_year
  FROM franchise_candidates
  WHERE base_title != title  -- only entries that had a sequel suffix stripped
  GROUP BY base_title
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
)
SELECT base_title, film_count, first_year, last_year, films
FROM franchise_groups
ORDER BY film_count DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year, t.kind_id,
       mii.info AS rating
FROM title t
JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id
WHERE mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
  AND t.kind_id = 1
  AND t.production_year >= 1980
  AND (
    t.title ILIKE 'Rocky%' OR
    t.title ILIKE 'Die Hard%' OR
    t.title ILIKE 'Indiana Jones%' OR
    t.title ILIKE 'Terminator%' OR
    t.title ILIKE 'Star Wars%' OR
    t.title ILIKE 'Alien%' OR
    t.title ILIKE 'Predator%' OR
    t.title ILIKE 'Batman%' OR
    t.title ILIKE 'Superman%' OR
    t.title ILIKE 'Rambo%' OR
    t.title ILIKE 'Mission: Impossible%' OR
    t.title ILIKE 'Fast & Furious%'
  )
ORDER BY t.title, t.production_year;

predicates: ((production_year >= 1980) AND ((title ~~* 'Rocky%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'Die Hard%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'Indiana Jones%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'Terminator%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'Star Wars%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'Alien%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'Predator%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'Batman%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'Superman%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'Rambo%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'Mission: Impossible%'::text) OR (title ~~* 'Fast & Furious%'::text)))

raw_sql:
SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year, t.kind_id, mii.info AS rating
FROM title t
JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id
WHERE mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
  AND t.kind_id = 1
  AND t.production_year >= 1980
  AND (
    t.title IN ('Rocky', 'Rocky II', 'Rocky III', 'Rocky IV', 'Rocky V', 'Rocky Balboa', 'Creed', 'Creed II') OR
    t.title IN ('Die Hard', 'Die Hard 2', 'Die Hard with a Vengeance', 'Live Free or Die Hard', 'A Good Day to Die Hard') OR
    t.title IN ('The Terminator', 'Terminator 2: Judgment Day', 'Terminator 3: Rise of the Machines', 'Terminator Salvation', 'Terminator Genisys') OR
    t.title IN ('Rambo: First Blood Part II', 'Rambo III', 'Rambo', 'First Blood') OR
    t.title IN ('Lethal Weapon', 'Lethal Weapon 2', 'Lethal Weapon 3', 'Lethal Weapon 4') OR
    t.title IN ('The Matrix', 'The Matrix Reloaded', 'The Matrix Revolutions') OR
    t.title IN ('Spider-Man', 'Spider-Man 2', 'Spider-Man 3') OR
    t.title IN ('Iron Man', 'Iron Man 2', 'Iron Man 3') OR
    t.title IN ('Saw', 'Saw II', 'Saw III', 'Saw IV', 'Saw V', 'Saw VI', 'Saw 3D') OR
    t.title IN ('The Fast and the Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', 'Fast & Furious 6', 'Furious 7', 'The Fate of the Furious') OR
    t.title IN ('Mission: Impossible', 'Mission: Impossible II', 'Mission: Impossible III', 'Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol', 'Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation') OR
    t.title IN ('Halloween', 'Halloween II', 'Halloween III: Season of the Witch', 'Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers', 'Halloween 5', 'Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers', "Halloween H20: 20 Years Later", 'Halloween: Resurrection')
  )
ORDER BY t.title, t.production_year;

raw_sql:
SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year, t.kind_id, mii.info AS rating
FROM title t
JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id
WHERE mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
  AND t.kind_id = 1
  AND t.production_year >= 1980
  AND (
    t.title IN ('Rocky', 'Rocky II', 'Rocky III', 'Rocky IV', 'Rocky V', 'Rocky Balboa', 'Creed', 'Creed II') OR
    t.title IN ('Die Hard', 'Die Hard 2', 'Die Hard with a Vengeance', 'Live Free or Die Hard', 'A Good Day to Die Hard') OR
    t.title IN ('The Terminator', 'Terminator 2: Judgment Day', 'Terminator 3: Rise of the Machines', 'Terminator Salvation', 'Terminator Genisys') OR
    t.title IN ('Rambo: First Blood Part II', 'Rambo III', 'Rambo', 'First Blood') OR
    t.title IN ('Lethal Weapon', 'Lethal Weapon 2', 'Lethal Weapon 3', 'Lethal Weapon 4') OR
    t.title IN ('The Matrix', 'The Matrix Reloaded', 'The Matrix Revolutions') OR
    t.title IN ('Saw', 'Saw II', 'Saw III', 'Saw IV', 'Saw V', 'Saw VI', 'Saw 3D') OR
    t.title IN ('The Fast and the Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', 'Fast & Furious 6', 'Furious 7') OR
    t.title IN ('Mission: Impossible', 'Mission: Impossible II', 'Mission: Impossible III', 'Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol', 'Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation') OR
    t.title IN ('Halloween', 'Halloween II', 'Halloween III: Season of the Witch', 'Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers', 'Halloween 5', 'Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers', 'Halloween: Resurrection')
  )
ORDER BY t.title, t.production_year;

predicates: ((production_year >= 1980) AND ((title = ANY ('{Rocky,"Rocky II","Rocky III","Rocky IV","Rocky V","Rocky Balboa",Creed,"Creed II"}'::text[])) OR (title = ANY ('{"Die Hard","Die Hard 2","Die Hard with a Vengeance","Live Free or Die Hard","A Good Day to Die Hard"}'::text[])) OR (title = ANY ('{"The Terminator","Terminator 2: Judgment Day","Terminator 3: Rise of the Machines","Terminator Salvation","Terminator Genisys"}'::text[])) OR (title = ANY ('{"Rambo: First Blood Part II","Rambo III",Rambo,"First Blood"}'::text[])) OR (title = ANY ('{"Lethal Weapon","Lethal Weapon 2","Lethal Weapon 3","Lethal Weapon 4"}'::text[])) OR (title = ANY ('{"The Matrix","The Matrix Reloaded","The Matrix Revolutions"}'::text[])) OR (title = ANY ('{Saw,"Saw II","Saw III","Saw IV","Saw V","Saw VI","Saw 3D"}'::text[])) OR (title = ANY ('{"The Fast and the Furious","2 Fast 2 Furious","Fast & Furious","Fast Five","Fast & Furious 6","Furious 7"}'::text[])) OR (title = ANY ('{"Mission: Impossible","Mission: Impossible II","Mission: Impossible III","Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol","Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation"}'::text[])) OR (title = ANY ('{Halloween,"Halloween II","Halloween III: Season of the Witch","Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers","Halloween 5","Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers","Halloween: Resurrection"}'::text[]))))

raw_sql:
WITH franchise_films AS (
  SELECT 
    t.id, t.title, t.production_year, mii.info AS rating,
    CASE 
      WHEN t.title IN ('Rocky', 'Rocky II', 'Rocky III', 'Rocky IV', 'Rocky V', 'Rocky Balboa', 'Creed', 'Creed II') THEN 'Rocky'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Die Hard', 'Die Hard 2', 'Die Hard with a Vengeance', 'Live Free or Die Hard', 'A Good Day to Die Hard') THEN 'Die Hard'
      WHEN t.title IN ('The Terminator', 'Terminator 2: Judgment Day', 'Terminator 3: Rise of the Machines', 'Terminator Salvation', 'Terminator Genisys') THEN 'Terminator'
      WHEN t.title IN ('First Blood', 'Rambo: First Blood Part II', 'Rambo III', 'Rambo') THEN 'Rambo'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Lethal Weapon', 'Lethal Weapon 2', 'Lethal Weapon 3', 'Lethal Weapon 4') THEN 'Lethal Weapon'
      WHEN t.title IN ('The Matrix', 'The Matrix Reloaded', 'The Matrix Revolutions') THEN 'Matrix'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Saw', 'Saw II', 'Saw III', 'Saw IV', 'Saw V', 'Saw VI', 'Saw 3D') THEN 'Saw'
      WHEN t.title IN ('The Fast and the Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', 'Fast & Furious 6', 'Furious 7') THEN 'Fast & Furious'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Mission: Impossible', 'Mission: Impossible II', 'Mission: Impossible III', 'Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol', 'Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation') THEN 'Mission: Impossible'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Halloween', 'Halloween II', 'Halloween III: Season of the Witch', 'Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers', 'Halloween 5', 'Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers', 'Halloween: Resurrection') THEN 'Halloween'
    END AS franchise
  FROM title t
  JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
    AND t.kind_id = 1
    AND t.production_year >= 1980
)
SELECT franchise, COUNT(*) AS film_count, 
       MIN(production_year) AS first_year, MAX(production_year) AS last_year,
       ROUND(AVG(rating::numeric), 2) AS avg_rating,
       array_agg(title || ' (' || production_year || ') [' || rating || ']' ORDER BY production_year) AS films
FROM franchise_films
WHERE franchise IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY franchise
ORDER BY film_count DESC;

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN (t.title = ANY ('{Rocky,"Rocky II","Rocky III","Rocky IV","Rocky V","Rocky Balboa",Creed,"Creed II"}'::text[])) THEN 'Rocky'::text WHEN (t.title = ANY ('{"Die Hard","Die Hard 2","Die Hard with a Vengeance","Live Free or Die Hard","A Good Day to Die Hard"}'::text[])) THEN 'Die Hard'::text WHEN (t.title = ANY ('{"The Terminator","Terminator 2: Judgment Day","Terminator 3: Rise of the Machines","Terminator Salvation","Terminator Genisys"}'::text[])) THEN 'Terminator'::text WHEN (t.title = ANY ('{"First Blood","Rambo: First Blood Part II","Rambo III",Rambo}'::text[])) THEN 'Rambo'::text WHEN (t.title = ANY ('{"Lethal Weapon","Lethal Weapon 2","Lethal Weapon 3","Lethal Weapon 4"}'::text[])) THEN 'Lethal Weapon'::text WHEN (t.title = ANY ('{"The Matrix","The Matrix Reloaded","The Matrix Revolutions"}'::text[])) THEN 'Matrix'::text WHEN (t.title = ANY ('{Saw,"Saw II","Saw III","Saw IV","Saw V","Saw VI","Saw 3D"}'::text[])) THEN 'Saw'::text WHEN (t.title = ANY ('{"The Fast and the Furious","2 Fast 2 Furious","Fast & Furious","Fast Five","Fast & Furious 6","Furious 7"}'::text[])) THEN 'Fast & Furious'::text WHEN (t.title = ANY ('{"Mission: Impossible","Mission: Impossible II","Mission: Impossible III","Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol","Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation"}'::text[])) THEN 'Mission: Impossible'::text WHEN (t.title = ANY ('{Halloween,"Halloween II","Halloween III: Season of the Witch","Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers","Halloween 5","Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers","Halloween: Resurrection"}'::text[])) THEN 'Halloween'::text ELSE NULL::text END)

predicates: ((production_year >= 1980) AND (CASE WHEN (title = ANY ('{Rocky,"Rocky II","Rocky III","Rocky IV","Rocky V","Rocky Balboa",Creed,"Creed II"}'::text[])) THEN 'Rocky'::text WHEN (title = ANY ('{"Die Hard","Die Hard 2","Die Hard with a Vengeance","Live Free or Die Hard","A Good Day to Die Hard"}'::text[])) THEN 'Die Hard'::text WHEN (title = ANY ('{"The Terminator","Terminator 2: Judgment Day","Terminator 3: Rise of the Machines","Terminator Salvation","Terminator Genisys"}'::text[])) THEN 'Terminator'::text WHEN (title = ANY ('{"First Blood","Rambo: First Blood Part II","Rambo III",Rambo}'::text[])) THEN 'Rambo'::text WHEN (title = ANY ('{"Lethal Weapon","Lethal Weapon 2","Lethal Weapon 3","Lethal Weapon 4"}'::text[])) THEN 'Lethal Weapon'::text WHEN (title = ANY ('{"The Matrix","The Matrix Reloaded","The Matrix Revolutions"}'::text[])) THEN 'Matrix'::text WHEN (title = ANY ('{Saw,"Saw II","Saw III","Saw IV","Saw V","Saw VI","Saw 3D"}'::text[])) THEN 'Saw'::text WHEN (title = ANY ('{"The Fast and the Furious","2 Fast 2 Furious","Fast & Furious","Fast Five","Fast & Furious 6","Furious 7"}'::text[])) THEN 'Fast & Furious'::text WHEN (title = ANY ('{"Mission: Impossible","Mission: Impossible II","Mission: Impossible III","Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol","Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation"}'::text[])) THEN 'Mission: Impossible'::text WHEN (title = ANY ('{Halloween,"Halloween II","Halloween III: Season of the Witch","Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers","Halloween 5","Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers","Halloween: Resurrection"}'::text[])) THEN 'Halloween'::text ELSE NULL::text END IS NOT NULL))

raw_sql:
WITH franchise_ids AS (
  SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title, t.production_year,
    CASE 
      WHEN t.title IN ('Saw', 'Saw II', 'Saw III', 'Saw IV', 'Saw V', 'Saw VI', 'Saw 3D') THEN 'Saw'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Halloween II', 'Halloween III: Season of the Witch', 'Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers', 'Halloween 5', 'Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers', 'Halloween: Resurrection', 'Halloween') AND t.production_year IN (1981,1982,1988,1989,1995,2002,2007,2009) THEN 'Halloween'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Rocky II', 'Rocky III', 'Rocky IV', 'Rocky V', 'Rocky Balboa') THEN 'Rocky'
      WHEN t.title IN ('The Fast and the Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', 'Fast & Furious 6', 'Furious 7') THEN 'Fast & Furious'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Die Hard', 'Die Hard 2', 'Die Hard with a Vengeance', 'Live Free or Die Hard', 'A Good Day to Die Hard') THEN 'Die Hard'
    END AS franchise,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY 
      CASE 
        WHEN t.title IN ('Saw', 'Saw II', 'Saw III', 'Saw IV', 'Saw V', 'Saw VI', 'Saw 3D') THEN 'Saw'
        WHEN t.title IN ('Halloween II', 'Halloween III: Season of the Witch', 'Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers', 'Halloween 5', 'Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers', 'Halloween: Resurrection', 'Halloween') AND t.production_year IN (1981,1982,1988,1989,1995,2002,2007,2009) THEN 'Halloween'
        WHEN t.title IN ('Rocky II', 'Rocky III', 'Rocky IV', 'Rocky V', 'Rocky Balboa') THEN 'Rocky'
        WHEN t.title IN ('The Fast and the Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', 'Fast & Furious 6', 'Furious 7') THEN 'Fast & Furious'
        WHEN t.title IN ('Die Hard', 'Die Hard 2', 'Die Hard with a Vengeance', 'Live Free or Die Hard', 'A Good Day to Die Hard') THEN 'Die Hard'
      END
      ORDER BY t.production_year) AS installment_nr
  FROM title t
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year >= 1980
),
franchise_cast AS (
  SELECT fi.franchise, fi.movie_id, fi.title, fi.production_year, fi.installment_nr,
         ci.person_id
  FROM franchise_ids fi
  JOIN cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = fi.movie_id
  JOIN role_type rt ON rt.id = ci.role_id AND rt.role IN ('actor', 'actress')
  WHERE fi.franchise IS NOT NULL
),
-- For each consecutive pair, compute cast overlap
installment_pairs AS (
  SELECT 
    f1.franchise,
    f1.installment_nr AS inst1,
    f2.installment_nr AS inst2,
    f1.title AS title1,
    f2.title AS title2,
    f1.production_year AS year1,
    f2.production_year AS year2,
    COUNT(DISTINCT f1.person_id) AS cast_size_1,
    COUNT(DISTINCT f2.person_id) AS cast_size_2,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN f1.person_id = f2.person_id THEN f1.person_id END) AS shared_cast
  FROM franchise_cast f1
  JOIN franchise_cast f2 ON f2.franchise = f1.franchise 
    AND f2.installment_nr = f1.installment_nr + 1
  GROUP BY f1.franchise, f1.installment_nr, f2.installment_nr, f1.title, f2.title, f1.production_year, f2.production_year
)
SELECT franchise, inst1, inst2, title1, year1, title2, year2,
       cast_size_1, cast_size_2, shared_cast,
       ROUND(100.0 * shared_cast / NULLIF(LEAST(cast_size_1, cast_size_2), 0), 1) AS retention_pct
FROM installment_pairs
ORDER BY franchise, inst1;

predicates: ((production_year >= 1980) AND (CASE WHEN (title = ANY ('{Saw,"Saw II","Saw III","Saw IV","Saw V","Saw VI","Saw 3D"}'::text[])) THEN 'Saw'::text WHEN ((title = ANY ('{"Halloween II","Halloween III: Season of the Witch","Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers","Halloween 5","Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers","Halloween: Resurrection",Halloween}'::text[])) AND (production_year = ANY ('{1981,1982,1988,1989,1995,2002,2007,2009}'::integer[]))) THEN 'Halloween'::text WHEN (title = ANY ('{"Rocky II","Rocky III","Rocky IV","Rocky V","Rocky Balboa"}'::text[])) THEN 'Rocky'::text WHEN (title = ANY ('{"The Fast and the Furious","2 Fast 2 Furious","Fast & Furious","Fast Five","Fast & Furious 6","Furious 7"}'::text[])) THEN 'Fast & Furious'::text WHEN (title = ANY ('{"Die Hard","Die Hard 2","Die Hard with a Vengeance","Live Free or Die Hard","A Good Day to Die Hard"}'::text[])) THEN 'Die Hard'::text ELSE NULL::text END IS NOT NULL))

raw_sql:
WITH franchise_ids AS (
  SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title, t.production_year,
    CASE 
      WHEN t.title IN ('Saw', 'Saw II', 'Saw III', 'Saw IV', 'Saw V', 'Saw VI', 'Saw 3D') THEN 'Saw'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Halloween II', 'Halloween III: Season of the Witch', 'Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers', 'Halloween 5', 'Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers', 'Halloween: Resurrection', 'Halloween') AND t.production_year IN (1981,1982,1988,1989,1995,2002,2007,2009) THEN 'Halloween'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Rocky II', 'Rocky III', 'Rocky IV', 'Rocky V', 'Rocky Balboa') THEN 'Rocky'
      WHEN t.title IN ('The Fast and the Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', 'Fast & Furious 6') THEN 'Fast & Furious'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Die Hard', 'Die Hard 2', 'Die Hard with a Vengeance', 'Live Free or Die Hard', 'A Good Day to Die Hard') THEN 'Die Hard'
    END AS franchise,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY 
      CASE 
        WHEN t.title IN ('Saw', 'Saw II', 'Saw III', 'Saw IV', 'Saw V', 'Saw VI', 'Saw 3D') THEN 'Saw'
        WHEN t.title IN ('Halloween II', 'Halloween III: Season of the Witch', 'Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers', 'Halloween 5', 'Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers', 'Halloween: Resurrection', 'Halloween') AND t.production_year IN (1981,1982,1988,1989,1995,2002,2007,2009) THEN 'Halloween'
        WHEN t.title IN ('Rocky II', 'Rocky III', 'Rocky IV', 'Rocky V', 'Rocky Balboa') THEN 'Rocky'
        WHEN t.title IN ('The Fast and the Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', 'Fast & Furious 6') THEN 'Fast & Furious'
        WHEN t.title IN ('Die Hard', 'Die Hard 2', 'Die Hard with a Vengeance', 'Live Free or Die Hard', 'A Good Day to Die Hard') THEN 'Die Hard'
      END
      ORDER BY t.production_year) AS installment_nr
  FROM title t
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year >= 1980
),
franchise_cast AS (
  SELECT fi.franchise, fi.movie_id, fi.title, fi.production_year, fi.installment_nr,
         ci.person_id
  FROM franchise_ids fi
  JOIN cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = fi.movie_id
  JOIN role_type rt ON rt.id = ci.role_id AND rt.role IN ('actor', 'actress')
  WHERE fi.franchise IS NOT NULL
),
installment_pairs AS (
  SELECT 
    f1.franchise,
    f2.title AS sequel_title,
    f2.production_year AS sequel_year,
    f2.movie_id AS sequel_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT f1.person_id) AS cast_size_1,
    COUNT(DISTINCT f2.person_id) AS cast_size_2,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN f1.person_id = f2.person_id THEN f1.person_id END) AS shared_cast,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN f1.person_id = f2.person_id THEN f1.person_id END) 
          / NULLIF(LEAST(COUNT(DISTINCT f1.person_id), COUNT(DISTINCT f2.person_id)), 0), 1) AS retention_pct
  FROM franchise_cast f1
  JOIN franchise_cast f2 ON f2.franchise = f1.franchise 
    AND f2.installment_nr = f1.installment_nr + 1
  GROUP BY f1.franchise, f2.title, f2.production_year, f2.movie_id
)
SELECT ip.franchise, ip.sequel_title, ip.sequel_year, ip.retention_pct,
       mii.info::numeric AS sequel_rating
FROM installment_pairs ip
JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = ip.sequel_id
  AND mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
ORDER BY ip.franchise, ip.sequel_year;

predicates: ((production_year >= 1980) AND (CASE WHEN (title = ANY ('{Saw,"Saw II","Saw III","Saw IV","Saw V","Saw VI","Saw 3D"}'::text[])) THEN 'Saw'::text WHEN ((title = ANY ('{"Halloween II","Halloween III: Season of the Witch","Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers","Halloween 5","Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers","Halloween: Resurrection",Halloween}'::text[])) AND (production_year = ANY ('{1981,1982,1988,1989,1995,2002,2007,2009}'::integer[]))) THEN 'Halloween'::text WHEN (title = ANY ('{"Rocky II","Rocky III","Rocky IV","Rocky V","Rocky Balboa"}'::text[])) THEN 'Rocky'::text WHEN (title = ANY ('{"The Fast and the Furious","2 Fast 2 Furious","Fast & Furious","Fast Five","Fast & Furious 6"}'::text[])) THEN 'Fast & Furious'::text WHEN (title = ANY ('{"Die Hard","Die Hard 2","Die Hard with a Vengeance","Live Free or Die Hard","A Good Day to Die Hard"}'::text[])) THEN 'Die Hard'::text ELSE NULL::text END IS NOT NULL))

raw_sql:
WITH data AS (
  SELECT franchise, sequel_title, sequel_year, retention_pct, sequel_rating
  FROM (VALUES
    ('Die Hard', 'Die Hard 2', 1990, 7.7, 7.1),
    ('Die Hard', 'A Good Day to Die Hard', 2013, 4.2, 5.6),
    ('Fast & Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 2003, 7.9, 5.4),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 2009, 2.6, 6.5),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', 2011, 15.3, 7.3),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast & Furious 6', 2013, 20.8, 7.5),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween III', 1982, 10.7, 4.1),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween 4', 1988, 0.0, 5.7),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween 5', 1989, 19.4, 4.8),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween: Curse', 1995, 3.8, 4.6),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween: Resurrection', 2002, 3.8, 3.9),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween (2007)', 2007, 0.0, 6.0),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween II (2009)', 2009, 13.2, 4.8),
    ('Rocky', 'Rocky IV', 1985, 16.7, 6.4),
    ('Rocky', 'Rocky V', 1990, 16.7, 4.8),
    ('Rocky', 'Rocky Balboa', 2006, 14.4, 7.2),
    ('Saw', 'Saw (2004)', 2004, 25.0, 7.7),
    ('Saw', 'Saw II', 2005, 16.7, 6.5),
    ('Saw', 'Saw III', 2006, 37.5, 6.1),
    ('Saw', 'Saw IV', 2007, 48.6, 5.8),
    ('Saw', 'Saw V', 2008, 36.4, 5.6),
    ('Saw', 'Saw VI', 2009, 29.5, 5.9),
    ('Saw', 'Saw 3D', 2010, 22.2, 5.5)
  ) AS t(franchise, sequel_title, sequel_year, retention_pct, sequel_rating)
)
SELECT 
  -- Overall Pearson correlation
  ROUND(corr(retention_pct, sequel_rating)::numeric, 3) AS overall_correlation,
  COUNT(*) AS n_observations,
  ROUND(AVG(retention_pct)::numeric, 1) AS avg_retention_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(sequel_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_sequel_rating
FROM data;

WITH data AS (
  SELECT franchise, sequel_title, sequel_year, retention_pct, sequel_rating
  FROM (VALUES
    ('Die Hard', 'Die Hard 2', 1990, 7.7, 7.1),
    ('Die Hard', 'A Good Day to Die Hard', 2013, 4.2, 5.6),
    ('Fast & Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 2003, 7.9, 5.4),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 2009, 2.6, 6.5),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', 2011, 15.3, 7.3),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast & Furious 6', 2013, 20.8, 7.5),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween III', 1982, 10.7, 4.1),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween 4', 1988, 0.0, 5.7),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween 5', 1989, 19.4, 4.8),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween: Curse', 1995, 3.8, 4.6),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween: Resurrection', 2002, 3.8, 3.9),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween (2007)', 2007, 0.0, 6.0),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween II (2009)', 2009, 13.2, 4.8),
    ('Rocky', 'Rocky IV', 1985, 16.7, 6.4),
    ('Rocky', 'Rocky V', 1990, 16.7, 4.8),
    ('Rocky', 'Rocky Balboa', 2006, 14.4, 7.2),
    ('Saw', 'Saw (2004)', 2004, 25.0, 7.7),
    ('Saw', 'Saw II', 2005, 16.7, 6.5),
    ('Saw', 'Saw III', 2006, 37.5, 6.1),
    ('Saw', 'Saw IV', 2007, 48.6, 5.8),
    ('Saw', 'Saw V', 2008, 36.4, 5.6),
    ('Saw', 'Saw VI', 2009, 29.5, 5.9),
    ('Saw', 'Saw 3D', 2010, 22.2, 5.5)
  ) AS t(franchise, sequel_title, sequel_year, retention_pct, sequel_rating)
)
SELECT 
  franchise,
  COUNT(*) AS n,
  ROUND(corr(retention_pct, sequel_rating)::numeric, 3) AS within_franchise_corr,
  ROUND(MIN(retention_pct)::numeric, 1) AS min_retention,
  ROUND(MAX(retention_pct)::numeric, 1) AS max_retention,
  ROUND(AVG(retention_pct)::numeric, 1) AS avg_retention,
  ROUND(MIN(sequel_rating)::numeric, 1) AS min_rating,
  ROUND(MAX(sequel_rating)::numeric, 1) AS max_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(sequel_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_rating
FROM data
GROUP BY franchise
ORDER BY avg_retention DESC;

WITH data AS (
  SELECT franchise, sequel_title, sequel_year, retention_pct, sequel_rating,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY franchise ORDER BY sequel_year) AS sequel_nr
  FROM (VALUES
    ('Die Hard', 'Die Hard 2', 1990, 7.7, 7.1),
    ('Die Hard', 'A Good Day to Die Hard', 2013, 4.2, 5.6),
    ('Fast & Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 2003, 7.9, 5.4),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 2009, 2.6, 6.5),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', 2011, 15.3, 7.3),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast & Furious 6', 2013, 20.8, 7.5),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween III', 1982, 10.7, 4.1),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween 4', 1988, 0.0, 5.7),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween 5', 1989, 19.4, 4.8),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween: Curse', 1995, 3.8, 4.6),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween: Resurrection', 2002, 3.8, 3.9),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween (2007)', 2007, 0.0, 6.0),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween II (2009)', 2009, 13.2, 4.8),
    ('Rocky', 'Rocky IV', 1985, 16.7, 6.4),
    ('Rocky', 'Rocky V', 1990, 16.7, 4.8),
    ('Rocky', 'Rocky Balboa', 2006, 14.4, 7.2),
    ('Saw', 'Saw (2004)', 2004, 25.0, 7.7),
    ('Saw', 'Saw II', 2005, 16.7, 6.5),
    ('Saw', 'Saw III', 2006, 37.5, 6.1),
    ('Saw', 'Saw IV', 2007, 48.6, 5.8),
    ('Saw', 'Saw V', 2008, 36.4, 5.6),
    ('Saw', 'Saw VI', 2009, 29.5, 5.9),
    ('Saw', 'Saw 3D', 2010, 22.2, 5.5)
  ) AS t(franchise, sequel_title, sequel_year, retention_pct, sequel_rating)
),
-- Compute residuals after regressing out sequel_nr effect (simple: deviation from franchise trend)
-- Use Pearson corr between retention and rating controlling for sequel_nr via partial correlation
centered AS (
  SELECT 
    franchise, sequel_title, sequel_nr,
    retention_pct - AVG(retention_pct) OVER (PARTITION BY franchise) AS ret_centered,
    sequel_rating - AVG(sequel_rating) OVER (PARTITION BY franchise) AS rat_centered,
    sequel_nr - AVG(sequel_nr::numeric) OVER (PARTITION BY franchise) AS nr_centered
  FROM data
)
SELECT
  -- Partial correlation: corr(retention, rating | sequel_nr) computed manually
  -- residual of rating ~ sequel_nr regression
  franchise,
  sequel_title,
  sequel_nr,
  ROUND(retention_pct::numeric, 1) AS retention_pct,
  sequel_rating,
  ROUND((ret_centered - (SUM(ret_centered * nr_centered) OVER (PARTITION BY franchise) / NULLIF(SUM(nr_centered^2) OVER (PARTITION BY franchise),0)) * nr_centered)::numeric, 3) AS ret_resid,
  ROUND((rat_centered - (SUM(rat_centered * nr_centered) OVER (PARTITION BY franchise) / NULLIF(SUM(nr_centered^2) OVER (PARTITION BY franchise),0)) * nr_centered)::numeric, 3) AS rat_resid
FROM centered
NATURAL JOIN (SELECT franchise, sequel_title, retention_pct, sequel_rating FROM data) d2
ORDER BY franchise, sequel_nr;

WITH residuals AS (
  SELECT franchise, sequel_title, sequel_nr, retention_pct, sequel_rating,
         ret_resid, rat_resid
  FROM (VALUES
    ('Die Hard', 'Die Hard 2', 1, 7.7, 7.1, 0.000, 0.000),
    ('Die Hard', 'A Good Day to Die Hard', 2, 4.2, 5.6, 0.000, 0.000),
    ('Fast & Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 1, 7.9, 5.4, 3.960, -0.210),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 2, 2.6, 6.5, -6.480, 0.180),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', 3, 15.3, 7.3, 1.080, 0.270),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast & Furious 6', 4, 20.8, 7.5, 1.440, -0.240),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween III', 1, 10.7, 4.1, 2.561, -0.550),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween 4', 2, 0.0, 5.7, -7.850, 0.986),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween 5', 3, 19.4, 4.8, 11.839, 0.021),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween: Curse', 4, 3.8, 4.6, -3.471, -0.243),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween: Resurrection', 5, 3.8, 3.9, -3.182, -1.007),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween (2007)', 6, 0.0, 6.0, -6.693, 1.029),
    ('Halloween', 'Halloween II (2009)', 7, 13.2, 4.8, 6.796, -0.236),
    ('Rocky', 'Rocky IV', 1, 16.7, 6.4, -0.383, 0.667),
    ('Rocky', 'Rocky V', 2, 16.7, 4.8, 0.767, -1.333),
    ('Rocky', 'Rocky Balboa', 3, 14.4, 7.2, -0.383, 0.667),
    ('Saw', 'Saw (2004)', 1, 25.0, 7.7, -4.118, 0.654),
    ('Saw', 'Saw II', 2, 16.7, 6.5, -12.993, -0.250),
    ('Saw', 'Saw III', 3, 37.5, 6.1, 7.232, -0.354),
    ('Saw', 'Saw IV', 4, 48.6, 5.8, 17.757, -0.357),
    ('Saw', 'Saw V', 5, 36.4, 5.6, 4.982, -0.261),
    ('Saw', 'Saw VI', 6, 29.5, 5.9, -2.493, 0.336),
    ('Saw', 'Saw 3D', 7, 22.2, 5.5, -10.368, 0.232)
  ) AS t(franchise, sequel_title, sequel_nr, retention_pct, sequel_rating, ret_resid, rat_resid)
  WHERE franchise != 'Die Hard'  -- only 2 pts, zero variance in residuals
)
SELECT
  ROUND(corr(ret_resid, rat_resid)::numeric, 3) AS partial_corr_controlling_sequel_nr,
  ROUND(corr(retention_pct, sequel_rating)::numeric, 3) AS raw_corr,
  ROUND(corr(sequel_nr::numeric, sequel_rating)::numeric, 3) AS sequel_nr_vs_rating,
  ROUND(corr(sequel_nr::numeric, retention_pct)::numeric, 3) AS sequel_nr_vs_retention,
  COUNT(*) AS n
FROM residuals;

WITH franchise_ids AS (
  SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title, t.production_year,
    CASE 
      WHEN t.title IN ('Saw', 'Saw II', 'Saw III', 'Saw IV', 'Saw V', 'Saw VI', 'Saw 3D') THEN 'Saw'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Halloween II', 'Halloween III: Season of the Witch', 'Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers', 'Halloween 5', 'Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers', 'Halloween: Resurrection', 'Halloween') AND t.production_year IN (1981,1982,1988,1989,1995,2002,2007,2009) THEN 'Halloween'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Rocky II', 'Rocky III', 'Rocky IV', 'Rocky V', 'Rocky Balboa') THEN 'Rocky'
      WHEN t.title IN ('The Fast and the Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', 'Fast & Furious 6') THEN 'Fast & Furious'
      WHEN t.title IN ('Die Hard', 'Die Hard 2', 'Die Hard with a Vengeance', 'Live Free or Die Hard', 'A Good Day to Die Hard') THEN 'Die Hard'
    END AS franchise,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY 
      CASE 
        WHEN t.title IN ('Saw', 'Saw II', 'Saw III', 'Saw IV', 'Saw V', 'Saw VI', 'Saw 3D') THEN 'Saw'
        WHEN t.title IN ('Halloween II', 'Halloween III: Season of the Witch', 'Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers', 'Halloween 5', 'Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers', 'Halloween: Resurrection', 'Halloween') AND t.production_year IN (1981,1982,1988,1989,1995,2002,2007,2009) THEN 'Halloween'
        WHEN t.title IN ('Rocky II', 'Rocky III', 'Rocky IV', 'Rocky V', 'Rocky Balboa') THEN 'Rocky'
        WHEN t.title IN ('The Fast and the Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious', 'Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five', 'Fast & Furious 6') THEN 'Fast & Furious'
        WHEN t.title IN ('Die Hard', 'Die Hard 2', 'Die Hard with a Vengeance', 'Live Free or Die Hard', 'A Good Day to Die Hard') THEN 'Die Hard'
      END
      ORDER BY t.production_year) AS installment_nr
  FROM title t
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year >= 1980
),
-- Only top-10 billed actors (nr_order 1-10)
franchise_leads AS (
  SELECT fi.franchise, fi.movie_id, fi.title, fi.production_year, fi.installment_nr,
         ci.person_id
  FROM franchise_ids fi
  JOIN cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = fi.movie_id
  JOIN role_type rt ON rt.id = ci.role_id AND rt.role IN ('actor', 'actress')
  WHERE fi.franchise IS NOT NULL
    AND ci.nr_order BETWEEN 1 AND 10
),
installment_pairs AS (
  SELECT 
    f1.franchise,
    f1.installment_nr AS inst1,
    f2.installment_nr AS inst2,
    f1.title AS title1,
    f2.title AS title2,
    f1.production_year AS year1,
    f2.production_year AS year2,
    f2.movie_id AS sequel_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT f1.person_id) AS leads1,
    COUNT(DISTINCT f2.person_id) AS leads2,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN f1.person_id = f2.person_id THEN f1.person_id END) AS shared_leads,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN f1.person_id = f2.person_id THEN f1.person_id END) 
          / NULLIF(LEAST(COUNT(DISTINCT f1.person_id), COUNT(DISTINCT f2.person_id)), 0), 1) AS lead_retention_pct
  FROM franchise_leads f1
  JOIN franchise_leads f2 ON f2.franchise = f1.franchise 
    AND f2.installment_nr = f1.installment_nr + 1
  GROUP BY f1.franchise, f1.installment_nr, f2.installment_nr, f1.title, f2.title, f1.production_year, f2.production_year, f2.movie_id
)
SELECT ip.franchise, ip.title1, ip.year1, ip.title2, ip.year2,
       ip.leads1, ip.leads2, ip.shared_leads, ip.lead_retention_pct,
       mii.info::numeric AS sequel_rating
FROM installment_pairs ip
JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = ip.sequel_id
  AND mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
ORDER BY ip.franchise, ip.year1;

predicates: ((production_year >= 1980) AND (CASE WHEN (title = ANY ('{Saw,"Saw II","Saw III","Saw IV","Saw V","Saw VI","Saw 3D"}'::text[])) THEN 'Saw'::text WHEN ((title = ANY ('{"Halloween II","Halloween III: Season of the Witch","Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers","Halloween 5","Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers","Halloween: Resurrection",Halloween}'::text[])) AND (production_year = ANY ('{1981,1982,1988,1989,1995,2002,2007,2009}'::integer[]))) THEN 'Halloween'::text WHEN (title = ANY ('{"Rocky II","Rocky III","Rocky IV","Rocky V","Rocky Balboa"}'::text[])) THEN 'Rocky'::text WHEN (title = ANY ('{"The Fast and the Furious","2 Fast 2 Furious","Fast & Furious","Fast Five","Fast & Furious 6"}'::text[])) THEN 'Fast & Furious'::text WHEN (title = ANY ('{"Die Hard","Die Hard 2","Die Hard with a Vengeance","Live Free or Die Hard","A Good Day to Die Hard"}'::text[])) THEN 'Die Hard'::text ELSE NULL::text END IS NOT NULL))

raw_sql:
WITH lead_data AS (
  SELECT franchise, title2 AS sequel, year2, lead_retention_pct, sequel_rating,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY franchise ORDER BY year2) AS sequel_nr
  FROM (VALUES
    ('Die Hard',       'Die Hard 2',               1990, 44.4, 7.1),
    ('Die Hard',       'A Good Day to Die Hard',   2013, 10.0, 5.6),
    ('Fast & Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious',          2003, 10.0, 5.4),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast & Furious',            2009, 10.0, 6.5),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five',                 2011, 40.0, 7.3),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast & Furious 6',          2013, 60.0, 7.5),
    ('Halloween',      'Halloween III',             1982,  0.0, 4.1),
    ('Halloween',      'Halloween 4',              1988,  0.0, 5.7),
    ('Halloween',      'Halloween 5',              1989, 40.0, 4.8),
    ('Halloween',      'Halloween: Curse',         1995, 10.0, 4.6),
    ('Halloween',      'Halloween: Resurrection',  2002,  0.0, 3.9),
    ('Halloween',      'Halloween (2007)',          2007,  0.0, 6.0),
    ('Halloween',      'Halloween II (2009)',       2009, 40.0, 4.8),
    ('Rocky',          'Rocky IV',                 1985, 50.0, 6.4),
    ('Rocky',          'Rocky V',                  1990, 40.0, 4.8),
    ('Rocky',          'Rocky Balboa',             2006, 40.0, 7.2),
    ('Saw',            'Saw (2004)',                2004, 25.0, 7.7),
    ('Saw',            'Saw II',                   2005, 20.0, 6.5),
    ('Saw',            'Saw III',                  2006, 40.0, 6.1),
    ('Saw',            'Saw IV',                   2007, 40.0, 5.8),
    ('Saw',            'Saw V',                    2008, 40.0, 5.6),
    ('Saw',            'Saw VI',                   2009, 40.0, 5.9),
    ('Saw',            'Saw 3D',                   2010, 30.0, 5.5)
  ) AS t(franchise, title2, year2, lead_retention_pct, sequel_rating)
)
SELECT
  ROUND(corr(lead_retention_pct, sequel_rating)::numeric, 3)        AS overall_lead_corr,
  ROUND(corr(sequel_nr::numeric, sequel_rating)::numeric, 3)         AS fatigue_corr,
  -- Franchise breakdown
  MAX(CASE WHEN franchise='Fast & Furious' THEN ROUND(corr(lead_retention_pct, sequel_rating)::numeric OVER (PARTITION BY franchise),3) END) AS ff_corr,
  MAX(CASE WHEN franchise='Saw'            THEN ROUND(corr(lead_retention_pct, sequel_rating)::numeric OVER (PARTITION BY franchise),3) END) AS saw_corr,
  MAX(CASE WHEN franchise='Halloween'      THEN ROUND(corr(lead_retention_pct, sequel_rating)::numeric OVER (PARTITION BY franchise),3) END) AS halloween_corr,
  MAX(CASE WHEN franchise='Rocky'          THEN ROUND(corr(lead_retention_pct, sequel_rating)::numeric OVER (PARTITION BY franchise),3) END) AS rocky_corr
FROM lead_data;

raw_sql:
WITH lead_data AS (
  SELECT franchise, title2 AS sequel, year2, lead_retention_pct, sequel_rating,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY franchise ORDER BY year2) AS sequel_nr
  FROM (VALUES
    ('Die Hard',       'Die Hard 2',               1990, 44.4, 7.1),
    ('Die Hard',       'A Good Day to Die Hard',   2013, 10.0, 5.6),
    ('Fast & Furious', '2 Fast 2 Furious',          2003, 10.0, 5.4),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast & Furious',            2009, 10.0, 6.5),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast Five',                 2011, 40.0, 7.3),
    ('Fast & Furious', 'Fast & Furious 6',          2013, 60.0, 7.5),
    ('Halloween',      'Halloween III',             1982,  0.0, 4.1),
    ('Halloween',      'Halloween 4',              1988,  0.0, 5.7),
    ('Halloween',      'Halloween 5',              1989, 40.0, 4.8),
    ('Halloween',      'Halloween: Curse',         1995, 10.0, 4.6),
    ('Halloween',      'Halloween: Resurrection',  2002,  0.0, 3.9),
    ('Halloween',      'Halloween (2007)',          2007,  0.0, 6.0),
    ('Halloween',      'Halloween II (2009)',       2009, 40.0, 4.8),
    ('Rocky',          'Rocky IV',                 1985, 50.0, 6.4),
    ('Rocky',          'Rocky V',                  1990, 40.0, 4.8),
    ('Rocky',          'Rocky Balboa',             2006, 40.0, 7.2),
    ('Saw',            'Saw (2004)',                2004, 25.0, 7.7),
    ('Saw',            'Saw II',                   2005, 20.0, 6.5),
    ('Saw',            'Saw III',                  2006, 40.0, 6.1),
    ('Saw',            'Saw IV',                   2007, 40.0, 5.8),
    ('Saw',            'Saw V',                    2008, 40.0, 5.6),
    ('Saw',            'Saw VI',                   2009, 40.0, 5.9),
    ('Saw',            'Saw 3D',                   2010, 30.0, 5.5)
  ) AS t(franchise, title2, year2, lead_retention_pct, sequel_rating)
)
SELECT
  franchise,
  COUNT(*) AS n,
  ROUND(corr(lead_retention_pct, sequel_rating)::numeric, 3) AS lead_retention_rating_corr,
  ROUND(corr(sequel_nr::numeric, sequel_rating)::numeric, 3) AS sequel_nr_rating_corr,
  ROUND(AVG(lead_retention_pct)::numeric, 1) AS avg_lead_retention_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(sequel_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_sequel_rating
FROM lead_data
GROUP BY franchise
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'OVERALL', COUNT(*), 
  ROUND(corr(lead_retention_pct, sequel_rating)::numeric, 3),
  ROUND(corr(sequel_nr::numeric, sequel_rating)::numeric, 3),
  ROUND(AVG(lead_retention_pct)::numeric, 1),
  ROUND(AVG(sequel_rating)::numeric, 2)
FROM lead_data
ORDER BY franchise;
